title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies:
Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies!
